desc: a KEYED <For> `by` receives the RAW item, so a loop var that shadows a $computed must stay bare in the by-expression (Spike-012 R3-2 — extends NEW-4's loopValueBindings to the keyed by-expr): `by={(item) => item.id}` (bare) while the children body keeps the keyed accessor `item().id`. Pre-fix the by-expr emitted `item().id`, CALLING the raw item (runtime TypeError; invisible to strict-tsc because <Key each={… as readonly any[]}> makes item `any`)
